candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, but not total current assets.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but CHE should come from balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement starting cash, not period-end balance-sheet cash.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance, which matches the target definition.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Current liability component, but not the total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match to short-term debt/current financing debt; excludes lease liabilities and is preferable as a reported debt line.
Financing-related current borrowing; likely an additional short-term debt component separate from short term interest-bearing debt.
Current debt-like item but explicitly lease-related, which should be excluded under the baseline STD rule.

variables.notes: STD is split across two financing current-liability lines. Included short term interest-bearing debt and overdraft facilities; excluded lease liability - short term per rule.

candidates.why: Direct match to current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax-related current liability, but broader payroll/social tax accruals rather than income taxes payable.
Tax-related liability but non-current/deferred, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Exact match to net property, plant and equipment; preferred over balancing lines and right-of-use assets subcategory.

candidates.row_label: Right-of-use assets property plant and equipment
candidates.why: PPE-related asset line but only a subset and lease-related, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line rather than the cleaner reported PPE total.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit reported net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match to net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.
Operating cash flow subtotal before interest and taxes paid; less complete than net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the cleaner reported operating cash flow total.

variables.notes: Preferred the final reported operating cash flow total over the subtotal cash generated from operations.
